ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced its 16th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held virtually on August 5, 2026, ensuring all shareholders can access the FY 2025-26 Annual Report and AGM notice through various digital channels. Key dates include a final dividend record date of July 29, 2026, with payments commencing August 6, 2026, representing a material impact for investors. This communication is a standard regulatory compliance and shareholder outreach, with no red flags identified.
